texts.Common:AjaxOperationFailed: The operation could not be completed. Please check the data and try again.
texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the online learning and testing system.
texts.Landing:Title: Study, practice and take exams in one clear place.
texts.Landing:Subtitle: OMD.TestGo helps learners start quickly with Google, access Free/Premium content and complete exams from centrally managed question sets.
texts.Landing:PreviewExamDescription: Open an exam or practice set available for your account.
texts.Landing:PreviewPracticeDescription: Work through questions with clear navigation, timing and answer status.
texts.Landing:PreviewProgressDescription: Track answered questions, score and explanations when the mode allows it.
texts.Landing:PortalSectionTitle: The right experience for each role.
texts.Landing:PortalSectionDescription: Learners focus on exam practice. Admins focus on data, accounts and content.
texts.Landing:StudentPortalDescription: No internal account needed. Learners sign in with Google and go straight to the learning area.
texts.Landing:StudentBenefitResult: View results and explanations after submitting
texts.Landing:AdminPortalDescription: A separate workspace for managing users, Premium, questions, exams and practice sets.
texts.Landing:ClientCardDescription: Learners browse, enroll, study and track progress in a focused portal.
texts.Landing:AdminCardDescription: Operators manage courses, users, reports and platform configuration in a separate workspace.
texts.Client:Title: Client portal
texts.Client:Description: This area is designed for learners to discover courses, continue lessons and follow their study journey.
texts.Client:Feature:Catalog: Course catalog, categories and featured learning paths
texts.Client:Feature:LearningPath: Enrollment, lesson playback and course detail journeys
texts.Client:Feature:Progress: Personal dashboard, progress tracking and certificates
texts.Client:HeroSubtitle: Use the client side for course discovery, enrollment and personal progress.
texts.Client:Section:Dashboard: Recommended courses, latest lessons and your learning streak should live here.
texts.Client:Section:Enrollment: Enrollment, payment and course access flows should be grouped in the client experience.
texts.Client:Section:Profile: Profile, certificates, bookmarks and notifications should stay learner-focused.
texts.Client:Announcement:Free: << Free content is available. Premium content unlocks after the account is activated for Premium >>
texts.Client:Announcement:Premium: << Premium is active. You can view published Premium content >>
texts.Client:NoFreeItems: No Free content has been published by admin yet.
texts.Client:NoPremiumItems: No Premium content has been published by admin yet.
texts.Client:MatchingInstruction: Choose an item on the left, then choose the matching answer on the right to create a link.
texts.Client:MatchingActivePrompt: Choose an item on the left to start matching.
texts.Client:MatchingSelectQuestionFirst: Choose an item on the left first.
texts.Client:ResultSubtitle: Review the score, selected answers and explanations when the mode allows it.
texts.Client:AutoGradedScoreNotice: The current score only includes auto-graded questions. Essay answers are still pending manual grading.
texts.Client:AuthRequired: You need to sign in before starting a learning session.
texts.Client:PremiumRequired: This content requires a Premium account.
texts.Client:ItemNotAvailable: This content is not available right now.
texts.Client:ItemNotReady: This content does not have enough data to start.
texts.Client:RuntimeUnsupportedQuestionType: The "{0}" question type is not supported yet.
texts.Client:SingleChoiceOnlyOneAnswer: Single-choice questions allow at most one selected answer.
texts.Client:InvalidAnswerSelection: The selected answer set is invalid for the current question.
texts.Client:InvalidMatchingSelection: The matching selection is invalid for the current question.
texts.Client:MatchingRightChoiceAlreadyUsed: Each matching answer can be used only once.
texts.Client:EssayAnswerTooLong: The essay answer exceeds the current storage limit.
texts.Client:EssayMaxWordsExceeded: The essay answer exceeds the {0}-word limit.
texts.Client:SessionNotFound: The learning session was not found or is not accessible to you.
texts.Client:SessionNotWritable: This learning session is already closed and answers cannot be changed.
texts.Client:ResultNotReady: The learning session is still in progress, so the result is not available yet.
texts.Admin:Title: Admin portal
texts.Admin:Description: This area is for internal operations, content governance and system administration.
texts.Admin:Feature:Users: User, instructor, role and permission administration
texts.Admin:Feature:Reports: Operational dashboards, reports and moderation workflows
texts.Admin:HeroSubtitle: Use the admin side for content operations, user management and business reporting.
texts.Admin:Section:Content: Course authoring, lesson ordering and content review should be grouped in admin.
texts.Admin:Section:Operations: Enrollment oversight, learner support and moderation flows belong here.
texts.Admin:Section:Settings: System settings, permissions and platform configuration remain in admin only.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:WorkflowTitle: Operate content through one clear admin flow.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:WorkflowDescription: The admin dashboard helps you quickly access the key areas needed to run the system.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:NoPermission: The current account does not have access to admin features.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:HeroTitle: Manage learning and testing in one screen.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:HeroSubtitle: Quickly access the key areas: accounts, Premium, question bank, exams and practice. The layout is intentionally simple for faster admin work.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:KpiDeliveryHint: Assign questions to exams and practice
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:ModulesSubtitle: Core features are grouped so you can work faster and follow each area more easily.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:UserPremiumDescri: Manage user accounts, roles, passwords and Premium status.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:QuestionBankDescr: Manage subjects, question types, questions and data from Excel or PDF files.
texts.Admin:Dashboard:Simple:DeliveryDescripti: Create exams, practice sets and arrange questions for learners.
texts.Accounts:Title: Accounts management
texts.Accounts:Summary: Manage users, access roles and account status in the system.
texts.Accounts:SearchPlaceholder: Search by username, name or email
texts.Accounts:OpenFullEdit: Open full edit page for reset password and Premium
texts.Accounts:Name: First name
texts.Accounts:ListSubtitle: Review users, roles and account support actions.
texts.Accounts:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
texts.Accounts:CannotDeleteCurrentUser: You cannot delete the account currently signed in.
texts.Accounts:CreateDescription: Create a new user account and set the initial sign-in details.
texts.Accounts:EditDescription: Update the basic account profile and activation status.
texts.Accounts:PremiumInactiveDescription: This account does not have an active Premium subscription.
texts.QuestionTypes:Title: Question type management
texts.QuestionTypes:ListSubtitle: Manage question types used by the question bank, exams and practice.
texts.QuestionTypes:SearchPlaceholder: Search by code, name or description
texts.QuestionTypes:CreateDescription: Create a new question type configuration for question authoring.
texts.QuestionTypes:EditDescription: Update display name, answer input behavior and scoring rules.
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens only. Example: single_choice.
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeReadonlyHelp: The code is stable so existing questions do not lose their type mapping.
texts.QuestionTypes:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question type?
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeInvalid: Question type code may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeCannotBeChanged: Question type code cannot be changed after creation.
texts.QuestionTypes:SystemCannotBeDeleted: System question types cannot be deleted.
texts.QuestionTypes:MaximumOptionsMustBeGreate: Maximum options must be greater than or equal to minimum options.
texts.Subjects:Title: Subject management
texts.Subjects:ListSubtitle: Manage a standalone subject catalog kept as backup master data for future business expansion.
texts.Subjects:SearchPlaceholder: Search by code, name or description
texts.Subjects:CreateDescription: Create an independent subject catalog item for backup business structure.
texts.Subjects:EditDescription: Update the code, display name and active state of the subject.
texts.Subjects:CodeHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens only. Example: network_fundamentals.
texts.Subjects:Name: Subject name
texts.Subjects:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this subject?
texts.Subjects:CodeInvalid: Subject code may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
texts.Subjects:CodeAlreadyExists: Subject code "{0}" already exists or has been used before.
texts.Questions:Title: Question management
texts.Questions:ListSubtitle: Manage the question bank by type: choice questions, matching questions and essays.
texts.Questions:SearchPlaceholder: Search by title, content or explanation
texts.Questions:CreateDescription: Select a question type and fill the matching answer section.
texts.Questions:EditDescription: Update question content, answers and settings. The question type remains fixed after creation.
texts.Questions:PreviewDescription: Review the question content, answers and explanation before use.
texts.Questions:QuestionTypeReadonlyHelp: Do not change the question type after creation to avoid invalid answer structures.
texts.Questions:OptionsHelp: Single-choice questions require exactly one correct answer. Multiple-choice questions require at least one correct answer.
texts.Questions:MatchingPairsHelp: Matching questions require at least two complete pairs.
texts.Questions:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
texts.Questions:ConfirmHardDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this question from the database? This action cannot be undone.
texts.Questions:BulkNoSelection: Please select at least one question.
texts.Questions:ConfirmBulkPublish: Are you sure you want to publish the selected questions?
texts.Questions:ConfirmBulkArchive: Are you sure you want to archive the selected questions?
texts.Questions:OnlyArchivedCanBeDeleted: Only archived questions can be permanently deleted.
texts.Questions:CannotHardDeleteInUse: This question cannot be permanently deleted because it is still used in an exam or practice set.
texts.Questions:Import:Title: Import Excel
texts.Questions:Import:Description: Download the sample file, fill questions in Excel, then upload it so the system can check and save them as drafts.
texts.Questions:Import:TemplateDescription: The template contains SingleChoice, MultipleChoice, Matching and Essay sheets. Keep sheet names and column names unchanged.
texts.Questions:Import:Failed: The file has {0} errors. No rows were imported.
texts.Questions:Import:FixHint: Fix the errors using the sheet, row and column details below, then upload the file again.
texts.Questions:Import:PdfDescription: Upload a PDF so the system can extract text, parse staging rows and export a normalized Excel file. This step does not write data to the database.
texts.Questions:Import:PdfFileHelp: Only .pdf files are supported. If the PDF is image/scanned, the system will mark it as requiring OCR or manual review.
texts.Questions:Import:PdfReviewHint: Ready rows will be placed into the matching import sheets when downloading normalized Excel. Other rows stay in the PdfReviewQueue sheet for admin review.
texts.Questions:Import:PdfPreviewLimit: Only the first {0}/{1} rows are shown in this preview.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:Title: Premium subscription management
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:ListSubtitle: Manage manually activated 6-month Premium access for users.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:SearchPlaceholder: Search by username, name or email
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:CreateDescription: Activate a 6-month Premium subscription for a user. Reactivation after expiration creates a new activation number.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:EditDescription: Review activation details, extend by 6 months, or cancel this Premium subscription.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:SixMonthsHelp: V1 supports only the Premium 6-month plan.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:ActivationRule: Activation starts now and ends after 6 calendar months. If the old Premium expired or was cancelled, reactivation creates a new activation number.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:ExtendDescription: This action adds 6 calendar months to the current end time and does not increase the activation number.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:RenewDescription: The expired subscription is kept as history. The system creates a new subscription starting now, increases the activation number and ends after exactly 6 months.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:ConfirmRenew: Are you sure you want to renew Premium for this user?
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:ConfirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this Premium subscription?
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:InactivePlanCannotB: Cannot activate Premium with an inactive plan.
Cannot extend Premium using an inactive plan.
Cannot renew Premium using an inactive plan.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:OnlyActiveCanBeExte: Only active Premium subscriptions can be extended.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:OnlyExpiredCanBeRen: Only expired Premium subscriptions can be renewed.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:OnlyActiveCanBeCanc: Only active Premium subscriptions can be cancelled.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:AlreadyCancelled: This Premium subscription has already been cancelled.
texts.PremiumSubscriptions:UserAlreadyHasActiv: This user already has an active Premium subscription.
texts.Exams:Title: Exam management
texts.Exams:ListSubtitle: Manage exam configuration in admin, including Free/Premium, Fixed/Random and the assigned question pool.
texts.Exams:SearchPlaceholder: Search by code, title or description
texts.Exams:QuestionSearchPlaceholder: Search questions by title or content
texts.Exams:CreateDescription: Create admin exam configuration. Questions are assigned from the manage questions page.
texts.Exams:EditDescription: Update exam configuration. Active state is managed through the dedicated list action.
texts.Exams:EditActiveHelp: Use the list action to activate or deactivate the exam.
texts.Exams:PreviewDescription: Review the exam configuration and assigned questions in admin.
texts.Exams:NoQuestions: This exam has no assigned questions.
texts.Exams:NoAvailableQuestions: No matching questions are available to assign.
texts.Exams:Question: Question
texts.Exams:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this exam? Published exams will be archived instead of hard-deleted.
texts.Exams:ConfirmRemoveQuestion: Are you sure you want to remove this question from the exam?
texts.Exams:CannotPublishWithoutQuestions: You cannot publish an exam without questions.
texts.Exams:RandomCountExceedsPool: Random exam requires {0} questions but the current pool only has {1}.
texts.Exams:AssignedQuestionsBelowTarget: This exam requires at least {0} assigned questions, but currently has only {1}.
texts.Exams:InactiveQuestionTypeCannotBeUsed: Inactive question types cannot be used in automatic conditions.
texts.Exams:InactiveQuestionCannotBeUsed: Inactive questions cannot be assigned to exams.
texts.Exams:UnpublishedQuestionCannotBeUsed: Only published questions can be assigned to exams.
texts.Exams:AssignedQuestionsMustBePublished: An exam can only be published when every assigned question is active and published.
texts.Exams:QuestionAlreadyAssigned: This question is already assigned to the exam.
texts.Exams:AutoAssignDescription: Set conditions by question type and difficulty. If the question bank does not have enough questions, the system adds the best available amount and keeps your selected questions unchanged.
texts.Exams:AutoAssignAppliedPartial: Auto-added {0}/{1} questions to the exam. Shortage: {2}.
texts.Exams:AutoAssignNoRules: Please create at least one automatic condition before applying.
texts.Exams:AutoRuleConfirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this automatic condition?
texts.Exams:ArchivedAutoRulesCannotBeChanged: Automatic conditions cannot be changed for archived exams.
texts.Practices:Title: Practice management
texts.Practices:ListSubtitle: Manage practice set configuration in admin, including Free/Premium, Fixed/Random and the assigned question pool.
texts.Practices:SearchPlaceholder: Search by code, title or description
texts.Practices:QuestionSearchPlaceholder: Search questions by title or content
texts.Practices:CreateDescription: Create admin practice set configuration. Questions are assigned from the manage questions page.
texts.Practices:EditDescription: Update practice set configuration. Active state is managed through the dedicated list action.
texts.Practices:PreviewDescription: Review the practice set configuration and assigned questions in admin.
texts.Practices:NoQuestions: This practice set has no assigned questions.
texts.Practices:NoAvailableQuestions: No matching questions are available to assign.
texts.Practices:Question: Question
texts.Practices:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this practice set? Published items will be archived instead of hard-deleted.
texts.Practices:ConfirmRemoveQuestion: Are you sure you want to remove this question from the practice set?
texts.Practices:CannotPublishWithoutQuestions: You cannot publish a practice set without questions.
texts.Practices:RandomCountExceedsPool: Random practice set requires {0} questions but the current pool only has {1}.
texts.Practices:AssignedQuestionsBelowTarget: This practice set requires at least {0} assigned questions, but currently has only {1}.
texts.Practices:ArchivedCannotBeActivated: Archived practice sets cannot be activated.
texts.Practices:ArchivedCannotBePublished: Archived practice sets cannot be published.
texts.Practices:InactiveCannotBePublished: Inactive practice sets cannot be published.
texts.Practices:InactiveQuestionTypeCannotBeUs: Inactive question types cannot be used in automatic conditions.
texts.Practices:InactiveQuestionCannotBeUsed: Inactive questions cannot be assigned to practice sets.
texts.Practices:UnpublishedQuestionCannotBeUse: Only published questions can be assigned to practice sets.
texts.Practices:AssignedQuestionsMustBePublish: A practice set can only be published when every assigned question is active and published.
texts.Practices:QuestionAlreadyAssigned: This question is already assigned to the practice set.
texts.Practices:AutoAssignDescription: Set conditions by question type and difficulty. If the question bank does not have enough questions, the system adds the best available amount and keeps your selected questions unchanged.
texts.Practices:AutoAssignApplied: Auto-added {0} questions to the practice set.
texts.Practices:AutoAssignAppliedPartial: Auto-added {0}/{1} questions to the practice set. Shortage: {2}.
texts.Practices:AutoAssignNoRules: Please create at least one automatic condition before applying.
texts.Practices:AutoRuleConfirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this automatic condition?
texts.Practices:ArchivedAutoRulesCannotBeChang: Automatic conditions cannot be changed for archived practice sets.
texts.Auth:GuestMessage: You need to sign in to access the learner portal.
texts.Auth:AdminLoginDescription: Use an internal account to access the admin portal.
texts.Auth:AdminAccessDenied: This account does not have permission to access the admin portal.
texts.Auth:ClientLoginDescription: The learner portal uses Google for fast and secure sign in.
texts.Auth:GoogleNotConfigured: Google login is not configured. Please add ClientId and ClientSecret.
texts.Auth:GoogleLoginFailedDescription: The system could not complete Google authentication. You can try again.
texts.Auth:GoogleExternalInfoMissing: Could not read the Google login information.
texts.Auth:GoogleAccountCannotSignIn: This account cannot sign in right now.
texts.Auth:GoogleEmailMissing: Google did not return an email for this account.
texts.Auth:GoogleEmailNotVerified: The Google email is not verified.
